arts.ttl: Why are Manchester City playing in white at home against Inter Milan in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to change out of their normal home shirt when they take on Inter Milan in the new format of the Champions League, with the English side debuting a strip co-designed by Oasis singer Noel Gallagher . The Gallagher brothers are known to be huge Manchester City fans and Noel can often be seen attending games at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: John Terry responds to Rodri strike threat with clear Club World Cup stance
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to play at the Club World Cup next summer at the end of the Premier League season and despite the calendar garnering criticism from players, John Terry has rejected claims that stars don't care

arts.ttl: Sommer: “Manchester City are not only Erling Haaland”
arts.sum: Inter Milan goalkeeper Yann Sommer expressed his eagerness and confidence ahead of the team’s upcoming Champions League match against Manchester City. In a pre-match press conference, Sommer shared his thoughts on the team’s preparation, their start to the season, and the challenge of facing one of Europe’s top teams. “I can’t wait to play tomorrow’s game. We are prepared, we have worked to the maximum for this type of match, and I’m looking forward to it,” Sommer stated, highlighting the team’s readiness for the high-profile encounter. arts.ttl: Sneijder: “My ranking: Inter are in the front row with City and Real Madrid”
arts.sum: Former Inter midfielder Wesley Sneijder believes the Nerazzuri have what it takes to win the Champions League this season. Speaking with La Gazzetta dello Sport, the Dutchman previewed his former clubs match with Manchester City, explaining with Simone Inzaghi can match Pep Guardiola tonight. So Wesley, do you like this new Champions League? “I come from another generation, I played my whole life thinking of facing the same teams at home and away, but a novelty always excites me. arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Inter Milan – Match Preview
arts.sum: Manchester City entertain Inter Milan in Manchester on Wednesday night, in what is a repeat of the 2023 Champions League final. This week could have huge ramifications for both teams, as City play Arsenal on the weekend whilst Inter compete in the Milan derby. arts.ttl: Italy's World Cup icon Schillaci dies aged 59
arts.sum: Italian World Cup icon Salvatore Schillaci, the top scorer at the 1990 World Cup, dies aged 59.

arts.ttl: Who is Glenn Nyberg, the referee for Man City - Inter in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: Sweden’s Glenn Nyberg will referee one of the stand-out games in the opening week of the revamped UEFA Champions League, as Manchester City and Inter Milan face off today in a repeat of the tournament’s 2023 final. Who is Man City vs Inter referee Glenn Nyberg?
